title: Jujutsu Kaisen: Culling Game Colonies
description: Culling Game colony Loredeck for active rules, point transfer, Tokyo No. 1, Higuruma, Reggie, Sendai, Yuta, Hakari, Kashimo, and early colony survival pressure.
author: Saga

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen early and middle Culling Game colony action through Tokyo No. 2 Hakari/Kashimo material.
continuity.notes: Late Culling Game convergence, Sakurajima, Angel, Prison Realm resolution, Gojo unsealing, Shinjuku, post-series, anime-only changes, guidebook-only material, and Modulo should remain separate decks unless explicitly loaded.

dependencies.reason: Uses core Jujutsu Kaisen cursed energy, jujutsu society, Sukuna vessel, technique, and spoiler-gate assumptions.
